creator: jobaldwi@vt.edu
text:
The textproc/sp accidentally installs both config.h, and the original,
unpatched config.h.orig into ${PREFIX}/include/sp

Fix: Apply these patches to the Makefile and pkg/PLIST:
How-To-Repeat: fgrep .orig textproc/sp/pkg/PLIST; or install the port and look in
${PREFIX}/include/sp for config.h.orig
